sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57980" key="kli=tos2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κλῖτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n57980.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κλεῖτος</ref> </xr> (B). <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κλῑτύς</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κλειτύς</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
